title: Better Grass!
description: Vanilla-styled texture pack that smooths and refines grass, dirt, podzol, and mycelium while staying true to the original look.
body:
![BG logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dcaa1ce73c9905c6237b37b1f332b14082d98b5.png)

This _Vanilla-Style_ texture pack enhances and smooths the appearance of **grass, dirt, podzol, and mycelium** while remaining faithful to the original Minecraft look. Subtle refinements improve visual consistency without changing the classic pixel aesthetic. Transitions between blocks feel more natural and less noisy, creating cleaner landscapes.
